feed.title: What if we let Quantum Hunters get Bitcoin rewards ?

entry.title: What if we let Quantum Hunters get Bitcoin rewards ?
entry.summary:
The proposed draft Informational BIP by Amon presents a novel alternative to the current BIP-361 framework, which suggests suspending Bitcoin's neutrality to address quantum theft. Instead, this new proposal aims to leverage the quantum threat into an opportunity by structuring it as a self-financing prize mechanism, potentially the largest of its kind in technological history.
The proposal includes three main components designed to manage and incentivize the secure transition of Bitcoin in the face of advancing quantum technology. The first component is the Genesis Quantum Transaction (GQT), which acknowledges any successful transaction made from a quantum-exposed Bitcoin address. This recognition serves not only as a verification method but also triggers the mechanics of the other two components.
The second element, the Quantum Vault (QV), is set up to automatically collect 90% of the funds from these recognized transactions. These collected funds are then distributed periodically to proven quantum actors in synchronization with Bitcoin's halving cycle, ensuring ongoing contributions and advancements in quantum technology within the Bitcoin ecosystem.
The third component is the introduction of Quantum Proof Addresses (QPAs). These serve as on-chain identities for entities that demonstrate the capability to execute quantum captures. The creation of QPAs aims to establish a public and unfalsifiable register, mapping global quantum capabilities visibly and transparently within the blockchain.
Additionally, the capturing entity receives an immediate 10% of the funds as a First Reward, promoting immediate participation while the bulk distribution from the Quantum Vault ensures long-term alignment with the ecosystem's stability, rather than encouraging rapid liquidation of captured assets.
Amon’s draft is available for review and feedback at [this GitHub repository](https://github.com/amonmoce/Hunting-The-Bitcoin-One-Piece/blob/master/bip-hunting-the-bitcoin-one-piece.md) and invites both technical and philosophical perspectives to refine and enhance the proposal further.
